assertions.assertion: States that v4 uses HybridCache for token caching (not the old IDistributedCache directly)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 v4 section states 'In v4, client credentials tokens are cached using HybridCache'

assertions.assertion: Explains the two-tier L1 (in-memory) + L2 (distributed) cache architecture
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 states 'It is two-tier: in-memory L1 + optional remote L2'

assertions.assertion: Notes that explicit AddDistributedMemoryCache() registration is no longer required in v4
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 states 'No explicit registration is required for the default in-memory tier' and Version Reference shows this change

assertions.assertion: Mentions CacheLifetimeBuffer as a configuration option for controlling token refresh timing
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 3 shows 'options.CacheLifetimeBuffer = 60; // Cache tokens 60 s before they expire'
